spec_match.rationale: Wraps AbortController as AsyncDisposable so scope exit cancels every child fetch — exact ergonomic improvement the proposal enables.

interactive.rationale: Mock slow API + in-flight cancellation visible in the log.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Card promises 'scope ends, all child fetches abort'; delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't show what happens if the AbortController is already aborted when the scope enters. Doesn't show how to attribute the abort reason to the disposer.

openQuestions.title: Show AbortSignal.reason
openQuestions.detail: Disposer-driven aborts carry a reason. Set a custom reason in the asyncDispose and show it in the catch block so visitors understand the chain.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 1 follow-up question(s) remain.
